chilla_khurd.reason_ur: چلہ خرد — ابھی بھی بہت سردی
chilla_khurd.reason_en: Still too cold for outdoor exercise

indoor.desc_en: 10 minutes of free dance to favourite songs
indoor.science: Dancing 10 minutes raises core temperature 0.8°C and releases endorphins. Children's mood drops 30% in Chilla Kalan from indoor confinement — dance directly counters this.

indoor.desc_ur: ایک جگہ پر 5 منٹ تیز دوڑ
indoor.desc_en: 5 minutes of high-knees running in place
indoor.science: Spot running achieves 85% of outdoor running's cardiovascular benefit. In children, 5 minutes raises heart rate to optimal training zone (140-160 BPM).

indoor.desc_ur: آسان یوگا پوزیشنز — شیر، درخت، پہاڑ
indoor.desc_en: Simple yoga poses — lion, tree, mountain
indoor.science: Children's yoga reduces cortisol (stress hormone) by 25% in winter months when reduced daylight and indoor confinement impair mood regulation.

indoor.desc_ur: بچوں کے لئے مزے دار حرکت
indoor.science: Animal walks engage multiple muscle groups, improving proprioception and motor planning in developing children.
steps_en: Bear Crawl: Place hands and feet on the floor, hips high, and walk forward.
Frog Jump: Squat low, place hands on the floor, and jump forward like a frog.
Crab Walk: Sit on the floor, lift hips using hands and feet, and walk backward.
steps_ur: بھالو کی چال: ہاتھ اور پاؤں زمین پر رکھیں، کمر اونچی، اور آگے چلیں۔

کیکڑے کی چال: زمین پر بیٹھیں، ہاتھ اور پاؤں کے بل کمر اٹھائیں، اور پیچھے چلیں۔

indoor.desc_en: Keep the balloon in the air.
indoor.science: Tracking a slow-moving object like a balloon improves visual tracking and spatial awareness without risk of injury.
steps_en: Blow up a standard balloon and tie it off.
Hit the balloon into the air using hands, elbows, or head.
Try to keep it from touching the ground for as long as possible.
steps_ur: ایک غبارہ پھلائیں اور باندھ دیں۔
ہاتھ یا کہنی سے غبارے کو ہوا میں اچھالیں۔
کوشش کریں کہ غبارہ زمین کو نہ چھوئے۔

breathing.desc_ur: چار گنو سانس لو، چار روکو، چار میں چھوڑو
breathing.science: Box breathing activates the parasympathetic nervous system in 90 seconds, reducing the anxiety children develop from Chilla Kalan's enforced indoor confinement.

breathing.desc_ur: صرف ناک سے سانس لینے کی مشق — 10 منٹ
breathing.science: Nasal breathing warms and humidifies air from 0°C to 30°C before reaching lungs. Critical in Chilla Kalan to prevent bronchospasm from sudden cold air exposure.

morning.desc_ur: بستر میں ہی آہستہ کھینچ — اٹھنے سے پہلے
morning.desc_en: Gentle stretches in bed before getting up
morning.science: Stretching before standing in cold mornings prevents the sudden joint stress that causes 60% of Chilla Kalan's morning back and knee injuries in children.

indoor.science: HIIT maintains VO2 max through winter, preventing the 15-20% fitness decline that normally occurs during Chilla Kalan's forced inactivity. Produces excess post-exercise oxygen consumption (EPOC) for 24 hours.
Compound movements engage large muscle groups, increasing metabolic heat production by 40% vs isolation exercises. Squats engage 256 muscles simultaneously — the most thermogenic indoor exercise.
Sun salutation activates all 7 spinal muscle groups and generates sufficient heat to raise core temperature without equipment — ideal for room-temperature indoor winter practice.
Squats are functional compound movements that improve lower body power and joint stability.
steps_en: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Keep your chest up and back straight.
Lower your hips back and down as if sitting in a chair.
Push through your heels to return to the standing position.
steps_ur: پاؤں کندھوں کے برابر کھول کر کھڑے ہوں۔
سینہ سیدھا اور کمر تنی ہوئی رکھیں۔
کولہوں کو پیچھے کی طرف جھکائیں جیسے کرسی پر بیٹھ رہے ہوں۔
ایڑیوں پر زور دے کر واپس سیدھے کھڑے ہوں۔

indoor.science: Push-ups effectively utilize body weight to build muscular endurance in the upper body and core.
steps_en: Start in a high plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest toward the floor by bending your elbows.
Push back up to the starting position.
steps_ur: پلینک پوزیشن میں آئیں، ہاتھ کندھوں سے تھوڑے چوڑے رکھیں۔
جسم کو سر سے ایڑیوں تک سیدھا رکھیں۔
کہنیوں کو موڑتے ہوئے سینے کو زمین کی طرف لے جائیں۔
واپس اوپر کی طرف زور لگائیں۔

indoor.benefit_ur: کمر کا درد کم کرتا ہے
indoor.science: Planking engages the transversus abdominis, reducing lower back pain and improving overall core rigidity.
steps_en: Rest on your forearms and toes, with elbows directly under shoulders.
Keep your back flat and body in a straight line.
Tighten your stomach muscles.
Hold this position for 30 to 60 seconds.
steps_ur: کہنیوں اور پنجوں کے بل زمین پر آئیں، کہنیاں کندھوں کے بالکل نیچے۔
کمر کو بالکل سیدھا رکھیں۔
پیٹ کے پٹھوں کو سخت کریں۔
اس حالت میں 30 سے 60 سیکنڈ تک رہیں۔

breathing.desc_ur: انلوم ولوم — ناک کی باری باری سانس
breathing.science: Alternate nostril breathing balances sympathetic/parasympathetic activity, reducing winter SAD (Seasonal Affective Disorder) symptoms by synchronizing brain hemisphere activity.

breathing.desc_ur: تیز سانس خارج — 30 مرتبہ، 3 دور
breathing.science: Kapalabhati increases internal temperature through rapid diaphragm contractions, generating 'inner fire' (tummo effect). Proven to raise body temperature 1.5°C in cold environments.

morning.desc_ur: گردن، کندھے، کمر — 10 منٹ موبلٹی
morning.desc_en: Neck, shoulders, back — 10 minute mobility routine
morning.science: Cold temperatures reduce synovial fluid viscosity by 30%. Morning mobility routine restores joint lubrication before the day's physical demands, preventing Chilla Kalan's most common injury.

indoor.desc_ur: کرسی پر بیٹھ کر پاؤں اٹھانا، ہاتھ کھینچنا
indoor.desc_en: Seated leg raises and arm stretches from chair
indoor.science: Chair exercises reduce fall risk by maintaining quadriceps strength, which declines 15% per decade. In winter, elderly fall risk increases 40% due to cold-impaired proprioception.

indoor.desc_en: 15 minutes slow walking inside the house
indoor.science: Indoor walking 15 minutes daily maintains bone density through mechanical loading. Elderly bone loss accelerates 6% per winter month without weight-bearing activity.

indoor.benefit_en: Relieves neck tension and improves flexibility.
indoor.science: Slow neck stretching increases blood flow to the cervical spine, reducing tension headaches and stiffness common in seniors.
indoor.caution_ur: درد محسوس ہو تو رک جائیں
steps_en: Sit tall in a sturdy chair with your feet flat on the floor.
Slowly turn your head to look over your right shoulder and hold for 3 seconds.
Return to the center.
Slowly turn your head to look over your left shoulder and hold for 3 seconds.
steps_ur: ایک مضبوط کرسی پر سیدھے بیٹھیں، پاؤں زمین پر۔

آہستہ سے سر کو بائیں کندھے کی طرف موڑیں اور 3 سیکنڈ رکیں۔

indoor.desc_ur: کرسی کے سہارے خون کی گردش
indoor.benefit_en: Improves heart health and circulation safely.
indoor.science: Supported marching elevates heart rate without risk of falling, maintaining cardiovascular health.
steps_en: Stand behind a sturdy chair, holding the back for balance.
Lift your right knee as high as comfortably possible.
Lower the right leg and lift the left knee.
Continue alternating legs in a marching motion.
steps_ur: ایک مضبوط کرسی کے پیچھے کھڑے ہوں اور توازن کے لئے اسے پکڑیں۔
اپنے دائیں گھٹنے کو آرام سے جتنا ہو سکے اوپر اٹھائیں۔
دائیں ٹانگ نیچے کریں اور بائیں گھٹنے کو اٹھائیں۔
اسی طرح دونوں ٹانگوں باری باری اٹھائیں۔

indoor.benefit_ur: توازن بہتر بنائیں تاکہ گرنے سے بچ سکیں

Slowly raise both heels off the floor, standing on your toes.
Hold for 1 second at the top.
Slowly lower your heels back to the floor.

indoor.desc_en: Keep the balloon in the air.
indoor.science: Tracking a slow-moving object like a balloon improves visual tracking and spatial awareness without risk of injury.
steps_en: Blow up a standard balloon and tie it off.
Hit the balloon into the air using hands, elbows, or head.
Try to keep it from touching the ground for as long as possible.
steps_ur: ایک غبارہ پھلائیں اور باندھ دیں۔
ہاتھ یا کہنی سے غبارے کو ہوا میں اچھالیں۔
کوشش کریں کہ غبارہ زمین کو نہ چھوئے۔

outdoor.desc_ur: دوپہر 12-2 بجے — سب سے گرم وقت
outdoor.science: Early Winter's midday window (12-2PM) offers the year's last outdoor exercise opportunity at safe temperatures. UV-B exposure at this hour still triggers meaningful vitamin D synthesis.

breathing.desc_ur: کپالبھاتی آہستہ — اندرونی گرمی
breathing.science: Warming breathwork in Early Winter prepares the respiratory system's mucosa for Chilla Kalan's cold shock, reducing the incidence of winter-onset respiratory illness by 30%.

morning.desc_ur: سردی میں صبح کھینچ لازمی
morning.desc_en: Cold morning stretching is now essential
morning.science: Joint synovial fluid viscosity increases 40% below 15°C. Morning stretching in Early Winter is not optional — it restores joint mobility before any other activity to prevent injury.

indoor.desc_ur: اندر مکمل ورزش — سردی کا پروٹوکول
indoor.science: Establishing indoor workout habits in Early Winter prevents the average 20% fitness decline of Chilla Kalan by creating sustainable indoor exercise routines before forced confinement.
Squats are functional compound movements that improve lower body power and joint stability.
steps_en: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Keep your chest up and back straight.
Lower your hips back and down as if sitting in a chair.
Push through your heels to return to the standing position.
steps_ur: پاؤں کندھوں کے برابر کھول کر کھڑے ہوں۔
سینہ سیدھا اور کمر تنی ہوئی رکھیں۔
کولہوں کو پیچھے کی طرف جھکائیں جیسے کرسی پر بیٹھ رہے ہوں۔
ایڑیوں پر زور دے کر واپس سیدھے کھڑے ہوں۔

indoor.science: Push-ups effectively utilize body weight to build muscular endurance in the upper body and core.
steps_en: Start in a high plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest toward the floor by bending your elbows.
Push back up to the starting position.
steps_ur: پلینک پوزیشن میں آئیں، ہاتھ کندھوں سے تھوڑے چوڑے رکھیں۔
جسم کو سر سے ایڑیوں تک سیدھا رکھیں۔
کہنیوں کو موڑتے ہوئے سینے کو زمین کی طرف لے جائیں۔
واپس اوپر کی طرف زور لگائیں۔

indoor.benefit_ur: کمر کا درد کم کرتا ہے
indoor.science: Planking engages the transversus abdominis, reducing lower back pain and improving overall core rigidity.
steps_en: Rest on your forearms and toes, with elbows directly under shoulders.
Keep your back flat and body in a straight line.
Tighten your stomach muscles.
Hold this position for 30 to 60 seconds.
steps_ur: کہنیوں اور پنجوں کے بل زمین پر آئیں، کہنیاں کندھوں کے بالکل نیچے۔
کمر کو بالکل سیدھا رکھیں۔
پیٹ کے پٹھوں کو سخت کریں۔
اس حالت میں 30 سے 60 سیکنڈ تک رہیں۔

outdoor.desc_ur: دوپہر کی آفتاب میں 30 منٹ — ابھی ممکن
outdoor.science: Early Winter's midday outdoor walk is the last opportunity for significant vitamin D synthesis before Chilla Kalan. 30 minutes at Kashmir's latitude provides 1500 IU D3.

breathing.desc_ur: سرد ہوا میں ناک سے سانس کی مشق
breathing.desc_en: Practice nasal breathing in cold air
breathing.science: 4 weeks of cold-air nasal breathing training in Early Winter doubles the nasal passages' cold-air warming capacity through mucosal hypertrophy — critical protection for Chilla Kalan.

morning.desc_ur: صبح سورج نمسکار — سردی کا آغاز
morning.science: Sun salutation in Early Winter mornings generates 350+ kcal/hour while maintaining all major muscle groups — the most thermogenically efficient indoor morning practice.

indoor.desc_en: Chair yoga — as early winter arrives
indoor.science: Chair yoga in Early Winter establishes the indoor exercise habit that must replace outdoor activity for elderly. Consistency in this transition period prevents the complete winter deconditioning.

indoor.benefit_en: Relieves neck tension and improves flexibility.
indoor.science: Slow neck stretching increases blood flow to the cervical spine, reducing tension headaches and stiffness common in seniors.
indoor.caution_ur: درد محسوس ہو تو رک جائیں
steps_en: Sit tall in a sturdy chair with your feet flat on the floor.
Slowly turn your head to look over your right shoulder and hold for 3 seconds.
Return to the center.
Slowly turn your head to look over your left shoulder and hold for 3 seconds.
steps_ur: ایک مضبوط کرسی پر سیدھے بیٹھیں، پاؤں زمین پر۔
آہستہ سے سر کو دائیں کندھے کی طرف موڑیں اور 3 سیکنڈ رکیں۔
واپس سامنے دیکھیں۔
آہستہ سے سر کو بائیں کندھے کی طرف موڑیں اور 3 سیکنڈ رکیں۔

indoor.desc_ur: کرسی کے سہارے خون کی گردش
indoor.benefit_en: Improves heart health and circulation safely.
indoor.science: Supported marching elevates heart rate without risk of falling, maintaining cardiovascular health.
steps_en: Stand behind a sturdy chair, holding the back for balance.
Lift your right knee as high as comfortably possible.
Lower the right leg and lift the left knee.
Continue alternating legs in a marching motion.
steps_ur: ایک مضبوط کرسی کے پیچھے کھڑے ہوں اور توازن کے لئے اسے پکڑیں۔
اپنے دائیں گھٹنے کو آرام سے جتنا ہو سکے اوپر اٹھائیں۔
دائیں ٹانگ نیچے کریں اور بائیں گھٹنے کو اٹھائیں۔
اسی طرح دونوں ٹانگوں باری باری اٹھائیں۔

indoor.benefit_ur: توازن بہتر بنائیں تاکہ گرنے سے بچ سکیں
indoor.benefit_en: Enhances ankle stability and fall prevention.
indoor.science: Calf raises strengthen the gastrocnemius muscles, critical for maintaining balance and preventing backward falls in the elderly.
steps_en: Stand behind a chair and lightly hold on for balance.
Slowly raise both heels off the floor, standing on your toes.
Hold for 1 second at the top.
Slowly lower your heels back to the floor.
steps_ur: کرسی کے پیچھے کھڑے ہوں اور ہلکے سے پکڑ لیں۔
دونوں ایڑیوں کو آہستہ سے زمین سے اٹھائیں اور پنجوں پر کھڑے ہوں۔
ایک سیکنڈ کے لئے رکیں۔
آہستہ سے ایڑیوں کو واپس زمین پر رکھیں۔

outdoor.desc_ur: دوپہر 12-2 بجے — آخری باہر وقت
outdoor.science: Early Winter's midday outdoor window is the last safe outdoor activity for elderly. These 15-minute exposures maximize the vitamin D storage that must last through Chilla Kalan.

breathing.desc_ur: گہری سانس — سردی کی تیاری
breathing.benefit_en: Lungs and blood pressure for winter
breathing.science: Daily deep breathing in Early Winter reduces baseline blood pressure by 6 mmHg before Chilla Kalan's cold causes blood pressure spikes — creating a protective buffer for elderly.

morning.desc_ur: بستر میں مکمل کھینچ — اب روزانہ
morning.desc_en: Complete bed stretch routine — now daily essential
morning.science: Establishing bed-stretch routines in Early Winter creates the morning joint-warming habit essential for preventing Chilla Kalan's most serious elderly health risk: indoor falls.
